message:
chore(fsqlite-harness): fix supervision test assertions, migrate ArenaIndex import, add scheduler module

- Fix string interpolation in supervision test assertions (2 occurrences)
- Suppress unused loop variable warning in supervision tests
- Migrate ArenaIndex import from asupersync::types to asupersync::util in
  commit_pipeline and e2e_cancel_safety tests
- Add scheduler module declaration in lib.rs
- Expand eprocess module with additional process management helpers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
